# specs/

**Human-authored source of truth.** This is the only directory in the repository that humans write directly. Every other file — all code, all documentation, all configuration — is generated by AI agents from the files here.

## Files

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `showcase-master-spec.md` | Master catalog: examples list, skills list, overall project scope |
| `repo-overview-spec.md` | Repository purpose, key features, and quick-start instructions |
| `documentation-generation-spec.md` | Rules for AI documentation generation (AI-first rule, file layout, tone) |
| `contributing-spec.md` | Contribution guidelines: what humans may edit and how to trigger regeneration |

## The Rule

> **Never edit any file outside `specs/` or `examples/*/FunctionalSpec.md` / `examples/*/CodingSpec.md`.**
> All other files are agent-generated and will be overwritten on the next documentation-generator run.

## Regenerating Documentation

After editing any file in this directory, say:

> "Activate esp32-sdd-documentation-generator and rebuild all documentation."
